description: **This bug is in protoMaker, NOT in helixir.** The auto-mode agent attempted to merge PR #32 using `gh pr merge 32 --squash` even though `prMergeStrategy` in settings is set to `"merge"`. The `bookedsolidtech/helixir` repo has squash merges disabled at the GitHub repository level. This feature should be moved to the protoMaker/system-improvements board â€” it cannot be fixed from within helixir's codebase.
title: bug: system uses --squash merge despite prMergeStrategy set to merge

descriptionHistory.description:
The auto-mode agent attempted to merge PR #32 using `gh pr merge 32 --squash` even though `prMergeStrategy` in settings is set to `"merge"`. The `bookedsolidtech/helixir` repo has squash merges disabled at the GitHub repository level, so this caused a hard failure:

```
GraphQL: Squash merges are not allowed on this repository. (mergePullRequest)
```

**Root cause:** The agent is not reading or respecting the `prMergeStrategy` setting from `.automaker/settings.json` when constructing the `gh pr merge` command. It defaulted to `--squash` regardless of config.

**Impact:** Any PR created by the system on this repo will fail to auto-merge until this is fixed. PR #32 had to be manually recovered by Ava.

**Fix:** Ensure the PR merge step reads `gitWorkflow.prMergeStrategy` from project settings and passes the correct flag (`--merge`, `--squash`, or `--rebase`) to `gh pr merge`.

**Acceptance criteria:**
- When `prMergeStrategy: "merge"`, the system uses `gh pr merge --merge`
- When `prMergeStrategy: "squash"`, the system uses `gh pr merge --squash`
- When `prMergeStrategy: "rebase"`, the system uses `gh pr merge --rebase`
- Existing tests cover the merge strategy routing

**This bug is in protoMaker, NOT in helixir.** The auto-mode agent attempted to merge PR #32 using `gh pr merge 32 --squash` even though `prMergeStrategy` in settings is set to `"merge"`. The `bookedsolidtech/helixir` repo has squash merges disabled at the GitHub repository level. This feature should be moved to the protoMaker/system-improvements board â€” it cannot be fixed from within helixir's codebase.

recoveryStrategy.reason: Unclassified failure - needs investigation: Max agent retries exceeded (3)
